channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: MIT Bengaluru Builds India’s Future Semiconductor Talent Pipeline Through Rare Chip Fabrication Exposure - TimesTech
item.description: MIT Bengaluru Builds India’s Future Semiconductor Talent Pipeline Through Rare Chip Fabrication Exposure TimesTech

item.title: BYOVD Attacks Help Ransomware Gangs Bypass Endpoint Defenses - cyberpress.org
item.description: BYOVD Attacks Help Ransomware Gangs Bypass Endpoint Defenses cyberpress.org

item.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly session LIVE: CM Vijay's TVK wins trust vote with 144 ‘ayes’
item.description: Udhayanidhi leads DMK walkout during vote; commotion in House as AIADMK rebel MLAs extend support to TVK

item.title: MAIA: Presight CEO: UAE Leaders in AI Adoption
item.description: UAE-based AI company Presight has reported 1Q revenue up 22% y/y. The company says national infrastructure and mission-critical platforms remained fully operational during the regional instability. Thomas Pramotedham, CEO of Presight spoke to Bloomberg’s Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche on their performance. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Rangasamy takes oath as Puducherry CM for 5th time
item.description: Two other cabinet members — Malladi Krishna Rao from the regional party and A. Namassivayam of the BJP, also took oath as Ministers in the AINRC-led NDA government

item.title: Seventy police personnel felicitated for successful anti-terror operation in Jammu & Kashmir's Kathua
item.description: Kathua SSP Mohita Sharma presided over the function and appreciated the courage, professionalism and dedication displayed by the personnel

item.title: Air India cuts flights, tightens costs as West Asia conflict raises fuel prices and dents travel demand
item.description: Air India is reducing weekly flights and tightening spending as the West Asia conflict drives up fuel costs, increases flying time and weakens passenger demand, according to media reports. The airline is also facing pressure from a weaker rupee and rising operating expenses.

item.title: Google Report: AI Increasingly Integrated Into Cyberattack Chains - Israel Defense
item.description: Google Report: AI Increasingly Integrated Into Cyberattack Chains Israel Defense

item.title: West Bengal BJP president Samik Bhattacharya says new government will adopt new land policy to bring industries
item.description: He makes promises to not let any political party ask for money from people who want to open factories

item.title: Vijay clears floor test with 144 MLAs backing TVK: How the high-stakes assembly showdown unfolded
item.description: Tamil Nadu CM Joseph Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) successfully passed a crucial floor test, securing the support of several parties including a rebel AIADMK faction. This marks the first coalition government led by a new entrant, breaking the decades-long Dravidian political dominance. Vijay's victory solidifies his position as the state's first non-DMK, non-AIADMK chief minister since 1967.

item.title: SC directs State govt. to frame policy to introduce Rajasthani as a medium of instruction
item.description: Referring to the National Education Policy 2020, the Bench noted that the policy recognises that children learn better in their mother tongue and accordingly accords primacy to home, local, and regional languages in early education

item.title: Bitcoin holds above $80K despite hot US inflation data, signalling strong buyer confidence
item.description: Bitcoin held above the $80,000 mark despite hotter-than-expected U.S. inflation data, reflecting resilient investor sentiment in the crypto market. While Ethereum and select altcoins traded lower, analysts highlighted improving on-chain activity, institutional inflows and active buyer support, even as macroeconomic uncertainty and interest rate concerns kept broader market sentiment cautious.

item.title: Sensex to hit 89,000? Why Morgan Stanley is betting big on India Inc after 6-quarter slowdown
item.description: Morgan Stanley has turned more bullish on India, forecasting the BSE Sensex could rise to 89,000 by June 2027, implying around 15% upside from current levels. Strategist Ridham Desai said India is emerging from a six-quarter earnings slowdown into a stronger growth phase after a “mid-cycle” pause.

item.title: Jammu and Kashmir leaders ask Omar Abdullah government to follow steps of Tamil Nadu CM Vijay on liquor ban
item.description: To make a point on how it was not an easy move to ban liquor in J&K, Mr. Abdullah referred to former Prime Minister Morarji Desai’s visit to J&K and his advocacy to ban liquor in J&K in the 1970s

item.title: Police detain volunteers protesting tree felling near Hyderabad’s KBR National Park
Iran-Linked LPG Tanker Sails Past US Navy’s Blockade Line
item.description: A liquefied petroleum gas carrier, which has previously ferried Iranian cargoes, has sailed past the blockade boundary announced last month by the US Navy.

item.title: India’s RBI Governor Sees Fuel Price Hike If Oil Stays High
item.description: India may need to increase retail fuel prices if the conflict in the Middle East drags on, Reserve Bank of India Governor Sanjay Malhotra said.

item.title: NEET UG 2026 Paper Leak: The Chain Of Events That Forced Exam Cancellation
item.description: NEET UG 2026 Cancelled: NTA clarified that candidates will not be required to re-register.

item.title: A More Assertive China Awaits a Leverage-Less Trump | Insight with Haslinda Amin 05/13/2026
item.description: Insight with Haslinda Amin, a daily news program featuring in-depth, high-profile interviews and analysis to give viewers the complete picture on the stories that matter. The show features prominent leaders spanning the worlds of business, finance, politics and culture. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Tamil Nadu Government Floor Test LIVE Updates: Vijay-led TVK Government Wins Trust Motion With 144 Votes, 22 Opposed
item.description: Tamil Nadu Government Floor Test LIVE Updates

item.title: India more than doubles tariffs on gold imports
item.description: The government wants to curb non-essential imports to protect the rupee

item.title: RBI Revokes Licence of Mumbai's Sarvodaya Co-operative Bank - Siliconindia
item.description: RBI Revokes Licence of Mumbai's Sarvodaya Co-operative Bank Siliconindia

item.title: Hitachi Construction Shares Fall After $570 Million Block Trade
item.description: Hitachi Construction Machinery Co. shares extended their drop on Wednesday after major shareholder Hitachi Ltd. offloaded ¥90.1 billion ($571 million) of stock in a block trade.

item.title: Groww shares jump 6% even as Peak XV, two other US investors sell stake worth Rs 5,326 crore. What lies ahead?
item.description: Billionbrains Garage Ventures shares rebounded on Wednesday, recovering Tuesday’s losses triggered by a Rs 5,326 crore stake sale by Peak XV Partners, Ribbit Capital, and YC Holdings. The investors sold over 29.5 crore shares via bulk deals at an average price of Rs 180.43 apiece, a 1.5% discount to the previous closing price.

item.title: Nvidia's Huang joins Trump's China trip, spurring hopes for H200 deal
item.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is joining President Donald Trump's visit to Beijing. This inclusion sparks hope in China for progress on selling powerful AI chips. Huang's presence signals a potential shift in the ongoing standoff over these crucial technology sales. The trip aims to foster American business interests abroad.

item.title: Extremely saddening: Akhilesh on step-brother Prateek's death
item.description: He was a very good young man who wanted to achieve something through his own hard work. Sadly, he is no longer among us, says Samajwadi Party president Akhilesh Yadav

item.title: U.P. BJP announces State-wide protest over Samajwadi Party MP’s comment against PM Modi
item.description: U.P. CM Yogi Adityanath described the comment as an insult to the trust of 145 crore countrymen and the democratic dignity of India

item.title: Industries Minister Bharath holds door-to-door campaign in Kurnool; warns Secretariat staff over lapses
item.description: The Industries Minister conducted a door-to-door campaign in Ward No. 8 as part of the ‘Our City, Our Responsibility’ initiative

item.title: Gold Declines as Jump in US Inflation Lifts Rate-Hike Odds
item.description: Gold fell a second day after accelerating US inflation lifted the odds of the Federal Reserve raising interest rates this year.

item.title: FIR against Tumakuru madrasa management after 24 runaway children allege abuse and forced labour
item.description: During an interaction with officials, the children alleged that they had fled the madrasa due to physical assault, harassment, and ill-treatment by staff members

item.title: Trainer aircraft of private company crash lands in Baramati; no casualty reported
item.description: “The aircraft was flying at a comparatively low altitude when it developed a technical malfunction, and one one side of the aircraft reportedly hit a light pole before it struck the ground,” Superintendent of Police, Pune, said

item.title: Markets Down But Ridham Desai Bullish On Equity Growth As He Picks One Dark Horse - India IPO
item.description: Markets Down But Ridham Desai Bullish On Equity Growth As He Picks One Dark Horse India IPO

item.title: Potholes Cost Cities Millions Every Year, AI May Have Found The Solution
item.description: The technology could help cities reduce repair costs, improve road safety.

item.title: Bahrain-led UN resolution on Strait of Hormuz gains support of 112 nations
item.description: The resolution calls for free navigation through the strait and an end to Iranian attacks on its Gulf neighbours.

item.title: State CMs reduce convoy size following PM Modi’s appeal for saving fuel
item.description: In Uttar Pradesh, chief minister Yogi Adityanath has directed an immediate 50% reduction in the fleet of vehicles for himself and his cabinet, said people aware of the details

item.title: FirstRand Picks BofA, RMB to Advise on Sale of UK Aldermore Unit
item.description: FirstRand Ltd. hired Bank of America Corp. and its own investment-banking arm, Rand Merchant Bank, as advisers to help it sell its UK-based Aldermore Group and exit the European market, a spokesperson for the South African lender said.

item.title: Berger Paints shares soar over 9% after Q4 net profit jumps 27% to Rs 335 crore
item.description: Berger Paints India saw its shares surge following a robust Q4 FY26 profit jump of over 27%, driven by strong sales volumes and better margins. Despite global uncertainties, the company anticipates continued growth fueled by construction chemicals and new product launches, with price adjustments expected to bolster profitability.

item.title: India races to shield economy from Iran war-driven oil shock, capital stress - Reuters
item.description: India races to shield economy from Iran war-driven oil shock, capital stress Reuters

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak: Britain To Isolate 10 People As Precaution
item.description: British health authorities said on Tuesday that 10 people from remote British island territories who were contacts of individuals in the hantavirus outbreak will be brought

item.title: New BitUnlocker Downgrade Attack on Windows 11 Allows Access to Encrypted Disks in 5 Minutes - CyberSecurityNews
item.description: New BitUnlocker Downgrade Attack on Windows 11 Allows Access to Encrypted Disks in 5 Minutes CyberSecurityNews
